name: No-Bake Oatmeal Peanut Butter Energy Balls
description: No oven required — roll them up Sunday and snack all week. Packed with oats, peanut butter, and just enough chocolate to feel like a treat.
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, mix together the rolled oats, peanut butter, honey, mini chocolate chips, vanilla extract, and ground flaxseed and shredded coconut if using. Stir until fully combined.
Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 30 minutes. This makes the mixture firm enough to roll.
Once chilled, roll the mixture into 1-inch balls using your hands. Place on a parchment-lined tray or refrigerate in an airtight container for up to 1 week. Grab 2–3 per snack serving.
